# optionalShared()

**Type Method**

Returns a shared web history object, if one exists.

## Declaration

```swift
class func optionalShared() -> WebHistory!
```

## Return Value

A shared web history object initialized with the default web history file, or `nil` if one was not previously specified using the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebHistory/setOptionalShared(_:)] method.

## Related Documentation

- **load(from:)**: Loads the contents of the specified web history file.
- **WebKit Objective-C Programming Guide**

## Accessing Shared History Objects

- **setOptionalShared(_:)**: Sets the web history object to share.
